entries.explanation: Normalizes the incoming hidden states with RMSNorm and exposes variance/inverse-RMS tensors for inspection.
Applies the query/key/value linear projections and reshapes the projected hidden states into attention heads.
Gathers rotary-position cos/sin values and applies rotate-half RoPE to query and key heads.
Computes rectangular or square attention scores, applies the mask, and materializes softmax attention probabilities.
Models the VisiPrune visual-token attention adjustment stage when dispatch evidence shows visual-region clearing or tail-mass folding.
Multiplies attention probabilities by value heads, merges heads back to hidden size, applies output projection, and adds the residual.
Runs post-attention RMSNorm, gated SiLU MLP, down projection, and residual addition.
Aggregates the split small-tensor stages into one end-to-end layer flow for whole-layer visualization.
